articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization - TechCrunch
articles.description: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.
articles.content: Music streaming service TIDAL is the latest to take aim at AI-generated music with the introduction of a new policy that will prevent fully AI-generated music from making money on its platform. In ad… [+2460 chars]
